content: Hey! I have no clue what the progress is on this, but can someone fill me in? I would like to help, however fair warning: I'm not super familiar with the INTERNALS of Linux. I did notice though that the fs_context struct in the bindgen output(at least for me) is just a dummy output with the only property being something like _unused: [u8; 0].
:wave: , if you would like to contribute, then check the RFL website. There is the contributing section with links to Good First Issues to get familiar with the Linux kernel.
